description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a horizontally striped, three-quarter sleeve shirt and fitted pants, both of which appear casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's facial features are neutral, and his hair is short and neatly styled. The shoes are simple and closed-toe, blending seamlessly with the pants. The overall appearance suggests a typical city pedestrian, with no visible accessories or carried items. The surface of the figure is matte and smooth, with clear color separation between the shirt, pants, and shoes.
description: A stocky adult male in a striped shirt and fitted pants, standing in a T-pose with short hair and simple shoes. The figure has a casual, everyday urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the figure's profile, rounded torso, and arm extended to the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, and both arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, arm extension, and the contour of the figure's back and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: casual three-quarter sleeve shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
